arts.ttl: 'Glimpses': Portsmouth boss issues challenge to Sunderland loanee after first-team omission
arts.sum: Pompey fans have only seen the best of Adil Anouchiche ‘in glimpses’, according to John Mousinho.

arts.ttl: Coventry City v Portsmouth early team and injury news as 11 out and 2 doubts
arts.sum: Pompey are back on the road this evening as they take on Coventry City.

arts.ttl: Coventry City's Jack Rudoni refuses to compromise his style of play for safety
arts.sum: Jack Rudoni insists that he’ll not be holding back if the opportunity presents itself to throw himself to score another diving header for Coventry City, even if it puts his damaged shoulder in danger of popping out again. But it was his header against Oxford United that cost him a three match lay-off with a dislocated shoulder, although the 23-year-old says he won’t let caution get in the way of the manner in which he plays the game for the Sky Blues .

arts.ttl: 'We're close': Portsmouth boss optimistic about away form ahead of Coventry clash - despite 15 defeats in 21 games
arts.sum: John Mousinho is adamant Pompey are ‘evidently close’ to finally resolving their away-day woes.

arts.ttl: ‘Gone up a notch’: Portsmouth, Derby County and Cardiff City fired warning by in-form relegation rivals
arts.sum: Matt Bloomfield has fired a warning to Pompey and their relegation rivals following an impressive recent resurgence.

arts.ttl: Coventry City keeper needs backing not barracking as Tony Mowbray offers insight
arts.sum: It’s hard not to feel for Brad Collins who, once again, inadvertently put himself in the spotlight for his part in Burnley’s two goals, albeit the goalkeeper far from solely to blame in a case of collective culpability. And although Moore started the following season, glaring errors in consecutive 3-2 defeats at Millwall and Hull resulted in him being dropped and replaced by Wilson, who went on to have the season of his career, helping the Sky Blues all the way to the play-off final at Wembley.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss refuses to wait - and pinpoints key man's long-awaited comeback game
arts.sum: With matches ebbing away to clinch Pompey’s Championship survival, John Mousinho has pledged to take a ‘short-term decision’ over Rob Atkinson.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth should pre-empt star man interest with early contract offer: Opinion
arts.sum: Portsmouth are not safe yet, but the Fratton Park chiefs may have one eye on planning for another… The post Portsmouth should pre-empt star man interest with early contract offer: Opinion appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth braced for huge Coventry City and Derby County backing in impressive show of support
arts.sum: Pompey are back on the road on Wednesday evening.

arts.ttl: The dressing room ingredient Frank Lampard has 'worked on a lot' to achieve Coventry City success
arts.sum: Get the latest Coventry City news sent straight to your phone by joining our Sky Blues WhatsApp group. The 46-year-old, however, has provided a bit of insight to one of the secrets to his success at City when asked about the support network in place for goalkeeper Oliver Dovin, who faces a potentially dark period on a personal and mental level after being ruled out for several months with an ACL injury that requires surgery and a long haul back in terms of his rehabilitation.
